title: DSM5Diagnosis
description: JSON Schema for normalized DSM-5 diagnosis document format.

diagnosis_id.description: Unique identifier for the diagnosis, prefixed with DX_

diagnosis_name.description: Official name of the mental disorder

chapter_category.description: DSM-5 chapter category of the disorder

threshold_count.description: Description of the symptom threshold rule

symptom_id.description: Unique identifier for the symptom, prefixed with SYM_

description.description: Clinical description of how the symptom manifests

symptoms.description: List of symptoms associated with this diagnosis
